PF2E_FLYING_VISUAL_HELPER.Settings.enabl: Enable the client-side PF2e airspace visuals and tactical HUD.
Make the full ApplicationV2 airspace HUD available from Token controls. It remains closed until clicked, opens fully expanded, and closes on every Scene change.
Mark Foundry's actual Token footprint with a non-interactive ground cue and a restrained projection guide.
Use a compact relative-height axis in the full HUD; exact elevation remains visible on every Token. Disable for a compact Token list.
Render a layered acrylic shaft, fixed ground plate, and connectors between Foundry's Token-footprint center and the lifted art.
Render separate contact and height-cast shadows whose scale, offset, and opacity respond continuously to elevation.
PF2E_FLYING_VISUAL_HELPER.Settings.stand: Adjust the acrylic stand and base opacity.
PF2E_FLYING_VISUAL_HELPER.Settings.shado: Adjust the maximum opacity of the simulated height shadow.
PF2E_FLYING_VISUAL_HELPER.Settings.proje: Adjust the dashed flight projection and original-footprint ground marker opacity.
PF2E_FLYING_VISUAL_HELPER.Settings.shado: Increase or reduce the simulated shadow offset without changing rules distance.
PF2E_FLYING_VISUAL_HELPER.Hud.title: PF2e Airspace
PF2E_FLYING_VISUAL_HELPER.Hud.noNearbyAi: No visible airborne Token is within the visual {radius}-grid radius.
PF2E_FLYING_VISUAL_HELPER.Hud.empty: No visible Tokens match this filter.
